ops.text: PLAN ADOPTED (2026-07-10, acct-07 session): post-E2/E7 follow-up execution. Phase order: (1) E loop-hardening in lab [phase markers + finalize_experiment, invariants.py blocking preflight, judge health controls, bootstrap CIs]; (2) D ship two-stage to shadow [MlxDrafter port of LocalWatcher, watcher v001 registry (budget thr 0.2373046875, f1 0.8828125, auc 0.8534, render_version 1), Draft return type carrying sentinel_prob, refiner-optional cascade, shadow.db sentinel_prob column, daemon restart at budget threshold] parallel with (3) A1-A3 eval-v2 machinery on eval-v1 [source_kind sidecar join via dedup_key/sample_key, Q&A option-resolution accuracy, rubric judge validated by controls, leakage probe]; (4) B1 structural AskUserQuestion rendering as versioned watcher_prompt(render_version=2) + source_kind/session_id watcher columns + A4 eval-v2 freeze in dataset/frozen_v2; (5) E8 generation round [Tinker pilot w/ parity gate, dedup+corrective oversampling, epoch/all-layer/rank32/9B cells, grounding+attractor invariants]; (6) E9 rewrite-only stage 3 + E7 rerun. Key design calls: rendering versioned per model version in registry metadata (NOT cc-transcript change - previews baked at capture); Drafter returns Draft(text, sentinel_prob); eval-v1 stays frozen; shadow ships precision-first at budget point.
